idea: Add --use_fast_math nvcc flag + choreo --native-f16 on iter129 base
STRUCTURAL: Persistent kernel with atomic work-stealing loop. Barrier re-init between tiles too expensive.
STRUCTURAL: WARP_N=64 STAGES=4 launch_bounds(256,2). Smaller tile, 2x more grid tiles, same occupancy. Insufficient compute per tile.
MACRO: L2 promotion (L2_128B) for input TMA loads on iter131 base. No improvement on large problem size.
MACRO: setmaxnreg.dec 40 for producer on iter131 base. Ignored by ptxas with launch_bounds(256,2).
STRUCTURAL: WARP_N=128 TILE_K=32 STAGES=2 launch_bounds(256,3). BUILD FAIL: 64x128 WGMMA needs >80 regs, 3 CTAs limited to 80.
MACRO: Relaxed warpgroup_wait<1> with deferred empty signal. Potential SMEM race condition degraded perf.
STRUCTURAL: WARP_N=128 TILE_K=32 STAGES=3 launch_bounds(256,2). Halved K-tile doubles loop iters with less compute per iter. 68KB SMEM.
MACRO: 1D grid with swizzled tile mapping (group=8) for L2 reuse. Worsened locality for this problem shape.
STRUCTURAL: True 1p2c with 3 warp groups (384 threads). 2 consumers each with WARP_N=64. Numerical issues + lower perf.
